rowFilter.organization_admin_assignments.name: source_code
rowFilter.organization_admin_assignments.description: How this admin grant was created: manual assignment, approved claim, or accepted admin invitation.

rowFilter.organization_admin_assignments.name: organization_claim_request_id
rowFilter.organization_admin_assignments.description: Claim request that produced this admin grant, when source_code = approved_claim.

rowFilter.organization_admin_assignments.name: grant_notes
rowFilter.organization_admin_assignments.description: Optional onboarding or handoff notes kept with this admin grant.

rowFilter.organization_admin_assignments.name: revoked_at
rowFilter.organization_admin_assignments.description: Timestamp when this admin grant was manually revoked.

rowFilter.organization_admin_assignments.name: revoked_notes
rowFilter.organization_admin_assignments.description: Optional notes recorded when this admin grant was manually revoked.

rowFilter.custom_lists.council_id.name: council_id
rowFilter.custom_lists.council_id.description: Deprecated compatibility column. Must remain null; local_unit_id is canonical custom-list owner.

rowFilter.person_kofc_profiles.assembly_.name: assembly_number
rowFilter.person_kofc_profiles.assembly_.description: Knights of Columbus assembly number for members who belong to a 4th degree assembly.

rowFilter.organization_kofc_profiles.loo.name: lookup_city
rowFilter.organization_kofc_profiles.loo.description: Typeable lookup city/area for Knights council claim flows. Used for council discovery without exposing member matching.

rowFilter.organization_kofc_profiles.par.name: parish_associations
rowFilter.organization_kofc_profiles.par.description: Optional parish names served by the council. Multiple items are stored as a text array because one council can serve more than one parish.

rowFilter.organization_claim_requests.cl.name: claimant_official_name
rowFilter.organization_claim_requests.cl.description: Snapshot of the official name on file when the claim was submitted.

rowFilter.organization_claim_requests.cl.name: claimant_preferred_name
rowFilter.organization_claim_requests.cl.description: Snapshot of the preferred display name when the claim was submitted.

rowFilter.organization_claim_requests.st.name: status_code
rowFilter.organization_claim_requests.st.description: Claim workflow status. Expected values are pending, approved, rejected, or cancelled.

rowFilter.organization_claim_requests.re.name: review_notes
rowFilter.organization_claim_requests.re.description: Manual verification notes captured during super-admin review.

rowFilter.organization_claim_requests.re.name: requester_name
rowFilter.organization_claim_requests.re.description: Display name snapshot captured when the claim was submitted.

rowFilter.organization_claim_requests.in.name: initiated_via_code
rowFilter.organization_claim_requests.in.description: Entry point used to submit the claim request, such as signed_in_member or public_request.

rowFilter.organization_claim_requests.re.name: request_type_code
rowFilter.organization_claim_requests.re.description: Whether the request is for admin access or member access.

rowFilter.organization_claim_requests.de.name: decision_notice_dismissed_at
rowFilter.organization_claim_requests.de.description: Timestamp when the requester dismissed the reviewed decision notice on /me.

rowFilter.person_profile_change_requests.name: proposed_first_name

rowFilter.person_profile_change_requests.description: Requested last name change submitted by the linked user for admin review.

rowFilter.organizations.preferred_name.name: preferred_name

rowFilter.organization_memberships.membe.description: Canonical Knights of Columbus membership number imported from Supreme and stored on the membership record.
